video_id: Somebody in this world is glad you were born... Never Forget That ｜ Charles Mackesy.mp4.mp3
transcript: What do you want to be when you grow up? Kind. Isn't it odd? We can only share outsides, but nearly everything happens on the inside. What's the bravest thing you've ever said? Help. Asking for help isn't giving up. It's refusing to give up. to use fall for a reason under your strength not weakness i think you believe in me more than i do life is difficult i've discovered this you are loved and important and you bring to this world things that no one else can so hold on
